title: sedum pusillum
intro: Sedum pusillum, also known as small-leaved stonecrop or pusilla sedum, is a perennial plant species in the family Crassulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of sedum pusillum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Sedum pusillum can be prepared as a herbal remedy by making a tea from its leaves or roots, and it may also be used in tinctures and salves for topical application.
